/** * Returns a {@link Stream} backed by the given {@link Iterator}. *

* If the given iterator is an {@link CloseableIterator} add a {@link CloseableIteratorDisposingRunnable} wrapping the * given iterator to propagate {@link Stream#close()} accordingly. * * @param iterator must not be {@literal null} * @return * @since 1.8 */
